case_title: MARWAN MOHAMMAD DEISIEH VS. TERRI MARIE HUMPHRY ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HUMPHRY, TERRI MARIE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED

TRIAL RESET TO JUL-07-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-02-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED MAY-11-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUMPHRY, TERRI MARIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT GREGORY DAVIS WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT GREGORY DAVIS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEISIEH, MARWAN MOHAMMAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUMPHRY, TERRI MARIE $5,931.50 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,061.50, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT GREGORY DAVIS, IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
